title: Three days of contracting missed.  Any help for Home Depot and Lowes ?
content:
Living very rural tends to compound problems -- especially not being able to order materials for contracts. There are NO cell phone signals here to use 'smart phones' (which none of us have) and spyware 'apps'. It's order via the laptop with Firefox -- or nothing. These are the tools we were given.

You people don't even have a clue, do you ? Lots of SPEWING about all this and Mozilla trying to skate out of it with all volunteer 'support' and not have to expend one dime. Most of the answers for other posts are just Rope-a-Dope. Could be this ! Could be that ! Could be t'other one ! Roll the dice ! Take a guess ! No answer for this problem because I just looked -- again. Lots of mouths running though.

I COULD do Another back and forth on this with some half-clueless 'volunteer' but that's come to an end. Have requested permission to send our laptops in for installation of a browser ("..any browser, as long as we can order from Home Deport and Lowes..."). But be assured of this -- I will say something when I run into the clueless and witless masquerading as 'customer support.

Firefox NOT such a 'Free' product. We haven't looked at what our business loss is yet.
creator: joe_jupa
